The air-conditioning system quit after 2000 miles of a brand new Macan-s. It starts blowing Hot air as soon as the A/C is turned on.

narrative.headline: What 2022 Porsche Macan owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).
